title: AgIS Delegation Token
description: EXPERIMENTAL. Defines the structure of an AgIS Delegation Token — a signed assertion that grants a delegate agent permission to act on behalf of a principal agent for a bounded scope and duration. Schema is aligned with AgIS SDK v0.3.0-alpha.0.

principal_agent_id.description: Agent identifier of the principal (the agent granting delegation).

delegate_agent_id.description: Agent identifier of the delegate (the agent receiving delegation authority).

scope.description: Set of permission identifiers or action scopes that this delegation covers.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this delegation token was issued.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this delegation token expires. Must be after issued_at.

nonce.description: Optional random nonce for replay protection.

constraints.description: Optional constraints limiting how and where this delegation may be exercised.

max_depth.description: Maximum chain depth allowed for re-delegation. 1 means no re-delegation permitted.

allowed_targets.description: Optional list of target service URIs or identifiers where the delegation is valid.

signature.description: JWS-style signature over the canonical form of this delegation token, signed by the principal.

key_id.description: Key ID of the principal's signing key.

value.description: Base64url-encoded JWS compact or detached signature.
